passage.title: A Day with Use of Wanted
passage.text: I wanted water. I wanted to go home. He wanted a new car. She wanted to become a doctor. We wanted to take rest. They wanted to finish that work. Did you want tea? I did not want that book. He wanted to talk to me. I wanted some rest.
passage.hindiTranslation: मुझे पानी चाहिए था। मैं घर जाना चाहता था। वह एक नई कार चाहता था। वह डॉक्टर बनना चाहती थी। हम आराम करना चाहते थे। वे उस काम को खत्म करना चाहते थे। क्या तुम चाय चाहते थे? मुझे वह किताब नहीं चाहिए थी। वह मुझसे बात करना चाहता था। मुझे कुछ आराम चाहिए था।

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "I wanted water...."?
options: I did not want that book.
I did not want any mistake.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "I wanted water."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "I wanted to go..."?
options: He wanted to talk to me.
I wanted to finish this work quickly.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "I wanted to go home."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "He wanted a new..."?
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "He wanted a new car."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "She wanted to become..."?
options: Did you want to go outside?
She wanted to become a doctor.
comprehensionQuestions.answer: She wanted to become a doctor.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "She wanted to become a doctor."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "We wanted to take..."?
options: She wanted to become an engineer.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "We wanted to take rest."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "They wanted to finish..."?
options: I wanted to know the truth.
They wanted to finish that work.
comprehensionQuestions.answer: They wanted to finish that work.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "They wanted to finish that work."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "Did you want tea?..."?
options: She wanted to start her own business.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "Did you want tea?"

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "I did not want..."?
options: I did not want any mistake.
She wanted to become a doctor.
I did not want that book.
comprehensionQuestions.answer: I did not want that book.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "I did not want that book."
